title: [緊急] 譚詠麟 鍾鎮濤將到美國演出 親中立場對美甚有威脅 要求美方取消簽證！

replies.msg:
「大意係呢兩條友公開支持黑警暴力對待示威者，與美國民主自由嘅價值有所抵觸，加上其立場親中共，佢哋身為知名人士，好有可能會對美國華裔進行影響甚至統戰。所以要求美國移民執法局同聯邦調查局審視佢哋嘅演出簽證。最好可以取消簽證。 」

唔好講政治？你企得上撐警個大台已經等同表態！一個人無良知等同泯滅人性！行將就木仲是非不分無獨立思考，一把年紀只能淪為政治棋子受人唆擺！
咪再掩耳盜鈴食盡兩家茶禮！

自由太高尚 你兩條冚家拎不配擁有！
返去大灣區賺錢啦屌你老母！


請向美國有關當局投訴兩個香港無恥藝人起草件：（歡迎修訂並廣傳）將於三日後發出。

Dear Officer in Charge:
I,as a concerned HongKonger, would like to complaint the 2 Hong Kong popular pop-singers ,Mr. Wing-Lun Tam & Mr. Chun-Tao Chung who will enter USA for musical concerts performance ( Please see the attached venues & Days of events).
The reason for my concerned objection & complaint to their entries to USA is their recent participation in rally supporting the Hong Kong Police Force using lethal & inappropriate anti-violent weapons suppressing Hong Kong people ‘s peaceful gathering & demonstration of Anti-Extradition Bill to China .
These 2 singers are actually orchestrated in respond to the master-mind from China’s communist regime who use China market from times to times as baits to control those Hong Kong Singers & Artistic Performers ‘ to follow their party’s line in ideology & actions .
Further than that, these 2 singers have many ethic Chinese fans in USA who may be influenced & follow China’s party lines even they have pleaded loyalty in their neutralization to USA Citizenship.
Your prompt action to the above concern is really appreciated ; however, I remain .

Sincerely yours,

在美港人密切關注事件！
強烈譴責賣港藝人拉攏外國勢力！

Your prompt action to the above concern is really appreciated ; however, I remain .

Sincerely yours,

改左少少：

Dear Officer in Charge:

I, as a concerned HongKonger, would like to complain two Hong Kong popular pop-singers,Mr. Wing-Lun Tam & Mr. Chun-Tao Chung, who will enter the USA for their performance at various music concerts which are scheduled to be held from August xx to xx. ( Please see the attached venues & Days of events). In the interest of national security, I write to urge the authority to deny their entry into the United States.

Your attention should be drawn to their recent participation in a rally held in support of the Hong Kong Police Force ("HKPF"). HKPF has been widely considered by the public to have exercised excessive force against civilian protesters. In view of their use of their alleged use of inappropriate or even illegal force in suppressing Hong Kong people's freedom of peaceful assembly and demonstration on June 12, 2019, there have been calls from all walks of life in the community to set up an independent commission of inquiry. Amnesty International even verified that HKPF's acts on June 12 were violations of international law and standards by law enforcement officials. As such, the fact that the mentioned two pop-singers took part in a pro-HKPF rally shows that they are in support of suppression to fundamental rights and freedoms of Hong Kongers as well as loyalty to the Chinese Communist Party (despite their possession of US citizenship). This must be discouraged. Given their popularity in mainland China as well as Ethnic Chinese communities in the US, it is of utmost importance to stop the infiltration of Chinese Communist Party's influence.

Your prompt action to the above would be much appreciated ; however, I remain .

Sincerely yours,
你地兩個仆街生生世世擁抱大灣區啦
